title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A Google DeepMind retrospective marking ten years since AlphaGo defeated world champion Lee Sedol at Go in March 2016. The video reflects on how this match sparked the modern AI revolution and established foundations for subsequent advances in algorithmic discovery and scientific problem-solving like protein folding.
